channel.title: Class Creational Patterns on yexca'Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Class Creational Patterns on yexca'Blog

item.title: Factory Pattern
item.description: 📢 This article was translated by gemini-3-flash-preview Simple Factory Pattern Simple Factory is a creational pattern, but it is not one of the 23 standard GoF design patterns. Definition: Define a factory class that returns instances of different classes based on provided arguments. The created instances usually share a common parent class. Since the methods used to create instances in this pattern are typically static, it is also known as the Static Factory Method pattern.
